title: Reading and Use of English - Part 3
description: For questions 17 – 24, read the text below. Use the word given in capitals at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line. There is an example at the beginning (0). Write your answers IN CAPITAL LETTERS on the separate answer sheet.

content.text: The (0) of this discovery was (17) . Scientists made an (18) breakthrough that could change the way we think about the universe. The (19) of the research team was evident from the start, and their (20) to the project never wavered. What made their work truly (21) was the combination of traditional methods with (22) new technology. The results exceeded all (23) and brought (24) recognition to the entire department.

questions.explanation: We need an adjective: 'astonishing' means very surprising.
We need a noun: 'dedication' means commitment.
We need an adjective: 'remarkable' means worthy of attention.
We need an adjective: 'revolutionary' means involving a great change.
We need an adjective: 'international' means involving more than one country.
